creator: acieroid@awesom.eu
text:
I submitted the PRs to update graphics/zathura, x11-toolkits/girara (a
dependency of zathura), and graphics/zathura-pdf-poppler (a plugin of
zathura, like graphics/zathura-djvu).

With the patch submitted by the PR submitter, the port doesn't pass
the tests done with `port test'. I suggest to use the attached patch,
that fixes that (for some mysterious reason, LIBDIR seems to be set to
/usr/lib before the config.mk is executed).

On 20 August 2012 11:30, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of graphics/zathura,
>
> Please note that PR ports/170780 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/170780
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
